name: Llama 3.3 70B (Versatile)
strength: Exquisite bilingual explanations, perfect grammar accuracy, flawless JSON structuring
weakness: Requires cloud connection, larger API payload size

name: Llama3 32B (Groq)
strength: Incredible Korean native nuance comprehension, elegant formatting structures
weakness: Slightly higher generation time on long explanations

name: Groq Agentic Compound
strength: Deep multi-turn logical thinking, automated self-correction of translation anomalies
weakness: Higher latency due to multi-step reasoning cycles

name: GPT-OSS 120B (Groq)
strength: Massive knowledge base, highly comprehensive formatting and vocabulary breakdown
weakness: Can occasionally generate overly dense text blocks

name: Llama 2.5 14B (Local)
strength: Outstanding local privacy, highly reliable bilingual conversational grammar flow
weakness: Resource heavy on consumer VRAM, higher response latency locally

name: GPT-OSS 20B (Groq)
strength: Extremely snappy responses, great daily vocabulary matching
weakness: Struggles slightly with complex historic Batchim sound change logic

name: Llama 3.1 8B (Instant)
strength: Blazing fast inference speed (sub-100ms TTFT), highly compliant JSON mode
weakness: Brief, concise answers lacking elaborate Korean culture insights

name: Groq Agentic Mini
strength: Compact agentic loops, snappy thinking blocks

name: Llama 7B (Local)
strength: Snappy local inference, zero external data leakage, reliable CEFR Level 1-3 tasks
weakness: Struggles on advanced compound particles under harsh reasoning tests
